name: SureFire Local
highlight_text: Category: Local SEO & Digital Marketing Platform
description:
What Surefire Local Does?

Surefire Local is a leading digital marketing platform designed to help businesses grow their online presence and attract more customers. With a comprehensive set of features, including local SEO optimization, lead management, and automated marketing campaigns, Surefire Local empowers businesses to streamline their digital marketing efforts and achieve better results.

‍

Source: G2

‍

‍

Features

➡️ All-in-one platform for managing various aspects of digital marketing, including website management, SEO, content marketing, and social media.

➡️ Tools and strategies to improve local search visibility and rankings for businesses.

➡️  Lead tracking, nurturing, and management tools to optimize lead generation efforts.

➡️ Comprehensive analytics and reporting features to track performance and ROI.

➡️  Automation tools for scheduling and running marketing campaigns across multiple channels.

➡️ Helps businesses generate and manage online reviews to enhance reputation and credibility.

➡️  Customization features to tailor websites to individual visitors and improve user experience.

Benefits

⭐️  Provides a one-stop solution for all digital marketing needs, saving time and resources for businesses.

⭐️ Enhances local SEO efforts to increase visibility and attract more customers from the local area.

⭐️Optimizes lead generation and conversion processes, leading to higher sales and revenue.

⭐️ Offers actionable insights and data to inform marketing strategies and improve results.

⭐️  Streamlines marketing processes and reduces the need for multiple tools or agencies, saving money and effort.

⭐️ Helps businesses build and manage their online reputation through review generation and management features.

⭐️ Improves user engagement and conversion rates by delivering personalized website experiences.

‍

Pros: 

✅ Great customer service

✅ One-stop solution for everything local SEO 

Cons: 

❌ The analytics dashboard can be a little hard to understand 

❌ Does not integrate with a few CRM software so collating data might be a hurdle 

❌ The platform has a lot to offer and might be a little difficult to get used to

‍

Pricing plans are not transparent
what_people_say:
Likes:

“Using one platform to manage social channels, reviews, receive incoming leads, push out campaigns, while working with a dedicated marketing manager to help develop content has been excellent.”

‍

Dislikes:

“Could be quicker response time. Now and then some technical things need to be squared away but when that happens they do get it down eventually”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
